headlines.headline: Plevep Power files routine patent applications in wireless connectivity

sentiment.reasoning: A large share buyback program typically signals management confidence and provides immediate support to the stock price.

headlines.headline: Urvel Grid reports 3% increase in customer acquisition

sentiment.reasoning: A 3% increase in customer acquisition indicates positive growth momentum that likely compounds over the coming months.

sentiment.reasoning: An open letter from the COO addressing investor concerns suggests internal pressure or uncertainty that may weigh on sentiment.

scoring.methodology: Gemini scores only the effect implied by the headline text itself, then separates immediate reaction versus later carry-through within the same 100-day session.
